variants: Asmin Alvi currently resides in Shepherd’s Mill, a move that marks a new chapter from their beginnings in Fernwillow Estate. They studied at Zodiac River University, which served as a foundation for their career at Oakline Advisors. Asmin's work at the firm has not gone unnoticed, as they were recently awarded the Illuminated Pathmark Ribbon for their outstanding contributions to the industry.
